name: WEALTHFRONT CORP
business: Wealthfront is a technology-driven financial solutions platform that provides automated cash management, investment advisory, borrowing and lending, and financial planning products to digital-native clients. The company generates revenue primarily from cash management fees earned through a cash sweep program and asset-based investment advisory fees. It targets high-earning Millennials, Gen Z, and later generations who prefer digital-first financial services.

exposures.sentence: We are a product-driven technology company that built a financial solutions platform for digital natives, defined as those born after 1980 (i.e., Millennials, Gen Z, and later generations).
